name: JiimSmith integrations dispatch guards return clean 4xx
description: Verify integration dispatch validation rejects missing credentials and private webhook targets with clean 4xx responses instead of 5xx errors.

planSteps.description: Send GET {base_url}/api/v1/team/members and store the id of the member whose display_name is Adam (Lead).
Send POST {base_url}/api/v1/team/integrations/dispatch with header X-Member-Id set to the lead id and JSON {"target":"webhook","title":"probe"}.
Verify the response is 400 with a JSON detail explaining that url is required, not a 500.
Send POST {base_url}/api/v1/team/integrations/dispatch with header X-Member-Id set to the lead id and JSON {"target":"webhook","title":"probe","url":"http://127.0.0.1:9000/internal"}.
Verify the response is 400 and the detail mentions refusal of a private or internal address, not a 500.
Send POST {base_url}/api/v1/team/integrations/dispatch with header X-Member-Id set to the lead id and JSON {"target":"linear","title":"probe"}.
Verify the response is 400 with a JSON detail explaining api_key is required, not a 500.
